articles.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot Vulnerability Enables Data Theft
articles.description: A new vulnerability in Microsoft 365 Copilot allows attackers to steal sensitive data via a crafted URL. This poses significant risks for enterprise users.
articles.impact: Enterprises must urgently address this vulnerability.

articles.title: Record Sale for Pristine Super Mario Bros. Cartridge
articles.description: A pristine copy of Super Mario Bros. has sold for millions, breaking sales records due to its rarity and condition. Collectors are eager for such finds.
articles.impact: This sale highlights the value of collectibles.

articles.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Revives Airship Gameplay
articles.description: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation reintroduces the iconic Highwind airship, allowing players to pilot it once again. Fans are excited for this nostalgic feature.
articles.impact: Players can relive classic airship adventures.

articles.title: Nintendo Direct Breaks Viewership Records
articles.description: Nintendo's latest Direct was the most-watched showcase of 2026, peaking at 3.7 million viewers. The Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake trailer led the views.
articles.impact: Nintendo continues to captivate gaming audiences.

articles.title: New Crossword Puzzle Released by Defector
articles.description: Defector's latest crossword puzzle, crafted by Patrick Maher, is now available. It promises to challenge and entertain puzzle enthusiasts.
articles.impact: Puzzles provide a fun mental challenge.

articles.title: Apple and Tesla Collaborate on CarPlay Integration
articles.description: Apple and Tesla are reportedly enhancing CarPlay support for Tesla vehicles. This collaboration could improve user experience in electric cars.

articles.title: Google Chrome Update Ends Popular Ad Blockers
articles.description: Google Chrome's upcoming update will eliminate many popular ad blockers due to changes in extension policies. Users may face increased ads.
articles.impact: Users will face a less ad-free browsing experience.

articles.title: Discount on Popular Qi2 Power Bank for Readers
articles.description: The Baseus AM52 Qi2.2 power bank is now available at a discounted price of $42.99 for Verge readers. It's compatible with MagSafe devices.
articles.impact: Great savings on a popular power bank.

articles.title: EA Launches New Advertising Platform
articles.description: Electronic Arts has introduced EA Advertising, allowing brands to advertise directly within gameplay. This innovation aims to enhance brand engagement.

articles.title: Nintendo Deletes Hidden Info on Zelda Remake
articles.description: Nintendo has removed hidden information about the Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake from its site, leaving fans speculating about the game.
articles.impact: Fans are eager for more details.

articles.title: Uncertainty Surrounds Trump Mobile's T1 Phone
articles.description: A year after its announcement, the Trump Mobile T1 Phone's production status remains unclear, leaving potential buyers in doubt.
articles.impact: Uncertainty raises concerns among potential buyers.

articles.title: Craig Duncan Steps Down as Xbox Game Studios Head
articles.description: Craig Duncan has resigned from his position as head of Xbox Game Studios after 18 months. His departure raises questions about future leadership.
articles.impact: Leadership changes may impact Xbox's strategy.

articles.title: SN Operator Review: Backup Solution for SNES Games
articles.description: The Epilogue SN Operator is a device for backing up SNES games and saves, offering collectors a reliable preservation method. It's priced at $60.
articles.impact: Collectors can safeguard their game memories.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro Rumored Camera Upgrades
articles.description: Rumors suggest the iPhone 18 Pro will feature significant camera upgrades, enhancing photography capabilities. Three main features are anticipated.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro Casing Similar to Predecessor
articles.description: The iPhone 18 Pro is expected to use the same aluminum alloy casing as its predecessor, maintaining a mix of pros and cons from previous models.
articles.impact: Design continuity may affect user experience.
